turns.text: Thanks for calling Sears Home Services — what appliance can I help you with today?
My refrigerator died and I don't want to troubleshoot anything — just send a technician.
Absolutely — no troubleshooting, I'll get a technician out to you. What's the brand of the refrigerator, and what's your zip code so I can find someone nearby?
It's a GE, and my zip is 60614.
Thanks — a GE refrigerator in 60614. So I can book it and send your confirmation, may I have your name and email?
Let me read that email back to be sure I have it right: s-a-m-dot-r-i-v-e-r-a at example-dot-com. Is that correct?
Perfect. For your GE refrigerator in 60614, I have Alex Chen available Tuesday, July 15th from 8:00 to 10:00 AM, or Wednesday, July 16th from 1:00 to 3:00 PM. Which works better?
Let me confirm the details before I book: Alex Chen, Tuesday, July 15th, 8:00 to 10:00 AM, for your GE refrigerator at 60614, under Sam Rivera. Shall I book that?
You're all set — Alex Chen is booked for Tuesday, July 15th, 8:00 to 10:00 AM, for your GE refrigerator. A confirmation is on its way to sam.rivera@example.com. Anything else I can help you with?
